item.description: resemble 类似 they resemble library APIs demonstrate v. 证明 be devoted to 致力于 this chapter will be devoted to the System call concept in the Linux kernel. invokes 调用 the syscall instruction invokes a handler of a given system call. appropriate 合适的 all of these functions call an appropriate system call. ubiquitous 无处不在的 system calls are ubiquitous
